sentiment_score_definition: x <= -0.35: Bearish; -0.35 < x <= -0.15: Somewhat-Bearish; -0.15 < x < 0.15: Neutral; 0.15 <= x < 0.35: Somewhat_Bullish; x >= 0.35: Bullish
relevance_score_definition: 0 < x <= 1, with a higher score indicating higher relevance.

feed.title: Canaan posts 2025 annual report online, offers free hard copies
feed.summary: Canaan Inc. (NASDAQ: CAN) has filed its annual report on Form 20-F for the fiscal year ended December 31, 2025, with the SEC on April 15, 2026. The report is accessible on the SEC's website and the company's investor relations site. Shareholders and ADS holders can request a free hard copy by contacting the investor relations department via email.

feed.title: [Form 4] JPMORGAN CHASE & CO Insider Trading Activity
feed.summary: JPMorgan Chase & Co executive Marianne Lake reported an indirect open-market sale of 6,427 shares of common stock on April 15, 2026, through GRATs, at a price of $306.5666 per share. This transaction totals approximately $1.97 million. Following the sale, Lake retains substantial holdings in JPM, including 130,872 shares indirectly via GRATs, 73,726 shares directly, and 64,271 shares indirectly through a family trust.

feed.title: Why is Kraft Heinz Stock Falling, and is it a Generational Buying Opportunity?
feed.summary: The article discusses the recent decline in Kraft Heinz stock, noting it as one of Warren Buffett's less successful investments. It questions whether this presents a significant buying opportunity for investors. The Motley Fool's Stock Advisor team, however, did not include Kraft Heinz in their top 10 stock recommendations, instead highlighting other companies with substantial past returns.

feed.title: Silver Lake selling Dell (NYSE: DELL) Class C shares via Form 144
feed.summary: Silver Lake has filed a Form 144 to report proposed resales of Dell (NYSE: DELL) Class C Common Stock. These shares were acquired through the conversion of Class B Common Stock, with sales by various Silver Lake entities occurring between March 2 and March 23, 2026. The filing details numerous specific share lots and their corresponding sale proceeds.

feed.title: Silver Lake (DELL) files Form 144; 3,654 Class C shares noted on 04/15/2026
feed.summary: Silver Lake entities have filed a Form 144 for a proposed sale of 3,654 Class C Common Stock shares of Dell Technologies (DELL), acquired upon conversion of Class B Common Stock, with a transaction date of April 15, 2026. The filing also details numerous prior sales by related Silver Lake entities in March 2026, including large dispositions such as 191,451 shares for over $31 million on March 23, 2026. Experts indicate the Form 144 signals a proposed future sale while documenting past executed sales by affiliated funds.

feed.title: Is Veralto’s Mixed Quarter and Softer EPS Outlook Altering The Investment Case For VLTO?
feed.summary: Veralto reported a mixed quarter with revenues up 3.8% year-on-year to US$1.40 billion, beating EPS estimates, but issued next-quarter EPS guidance below analyst expectations. This combination suggests that while demand is present, the company is taking a measured approach to future profitability, possibly influenced by margin pressure and China exposure. Veralto’s investment narrative largely remains unchanged, focusing on long-term demand for water analytics and treatment, supported by active M&A and solid free cash flow.

feed.title: Lululemon: Products in China safe
feed.summary: Lululemon Athletica Inc. has stated that its products sold in China are free of PFAS, or "forever chemicals," following an investigation launched by the Texas Attorney General into the company's product safety claims. The company confirmed it phased out PFAS from its products in fiscal 2023 after their limited use in durable water repellent products. This investigation and consumer concerns highlight the increasing scrutiny over chemicals in synthetic fabrics, with China and other regions tightening regulations on PFAS.

feed.title: CareDx Divests Lab Products Business for $170M, Focuses on Precision Medicine Testing
feed.summary: CareDx, Inc. has announced the divestiture of its Lab Products business to EuroBio Scientific for $170 million in cash. This strategic move aims to sharpen CareDx's focus on its core Precision Medicine Testing Services and Patient and Digital Solutions, which have shown strong revenue growth. The transaction is expected to simplify the company's operating model and enhance financial flexibility for future strategic investments.

feed.title: The Technical Signals Behind (BLCR) That Institutions Follow
feed.summary: This article from Stock Traders Daily analyzes Blackrock Large Cap Core ETF (BLCR) using AI models, highlighting strong sentiment across all horizons and an exceptional 15.2:1 risk-reward setup. It outlines three institutional trading strategies—Position, Momentum Breakout, and Risk Hedging—with specific entry points, targets, and stop losses. The analysis provides multi-timeframe signal strengths, support, and resistance levels for BLCR.

feed.title: Are BHP shares or QBE shares better value in 2026?
feed.summary: This article compares BHP Group Ltd (ASX:BHP) and QBE Insurance Group Ltd (ASX:QBE) shares, assessing their value based on recent performance and key financial metrics. BHP's share price rose 22.6% since early 2025, and the company is highlighted for its stable, dividend-paying nature and strong ROE. QBE, an international insurer, is also examined for its growth and financial health, providing metrics like debt/equity ratio and dividend yield.

feed.title: Credicorp Ltd (BAP) Shares Fall 11.5% -- What GF Score of 81 Tel
feed.summary: Credicorp Ltd (BAP) shares dropped 11.5% to $316.49, indicating significant overvaluation with its current price 50.2% above its GF Value™ of $210.73. Despite a strong GF Score™ of 81/100, driven by growth and profitability, its financial strength and valuation components are low. Investors are advised caution due to the overvaluation and absence of recent insider trading activity.

feed.title: Meta platforms COO Olivan sells $2.9m in stock
feed.summary: Meta Platforms COO Javier Olivan sold 4,561 shares of Class A Common Stock for approximately $2.9 million on April 13, 2026, under a pre-arranged trading plan. This transaction occurred as Meta's stock was trading at $671.58, giving the company a market capitalization of $1.7 trillion. The article also touches on Meta's strong AI advertising returns, regulatory scrutiny from the EU regarding WhatsApp, and a new strategic partnership with Broadcom for AI infrastructure development.

feed.title: Why is Kraft Heinz Stock Falling, and is it a Generational Buying Opportunity?
feed.summary: The article discusses the recent decline in Kraft Heinz (NASDAQ: KHC) stock and debates whether it presents a buying opportunity. It highlights that even renowned investor Warren Buffett has found Kraft Heinz to be a disappointing investment. The Motley Fool Stock Advisor team did not include Kraft Heinz in their top 10 stock recommendations, which historically have produced significant returns.

feed.title: Short Interest in Valero Energy Corporation (NYSE:VLO) Declines By 25.9%
feed.summary: Valero Energy Corporation (NYSE:VLO) experienced a significant decrease in short interest by 25.9% in March, totaling 10,371,072 shares. This reduction, coupled with bullish analyst ratings and favorable market conditions for refiners, suggests a positive outlook despite near-term operational risks. The company also announced an increase in its quarterly dividend, reflecting confidence in its financial performance.

feed.title: Marinakis’ CCEC partners with BGN on LNG vessel venture
feed.summary: Capital Clean Energy Carriers Corp. (CCEC), controlled by Evangelos Marinakis, has partnered with global energy trader BGN Group in a joint venture to acquire and charter the LNG/C Amore Mio I. The joint venture, BM Capital HoldCo LLC, will acquire the vessel for $230 million and has secured a 10-year time charter with BGN INT DMCC, expected to generate up to $485.6 million in revenues. This strategic move aims to diversify CCEC’s charter portfolio, enhance balance sheet flexibility, and strengthen cash flow visibility for investors.

feed.title: News Corp Details US$1 Billion Share Repurchase Focused on Nasdaq-Listed Stock
feed.summary: News Corp is initiating a daily share buy-back program under its 2025 Repurchase Program, aiming to repurchase up to US$1 billion of its Nasdaq-listed Class A and Class B common stock. This move is a capital management strategy designed to enhance shareholder value and will not include ASX-listed CHESS Depositary Interests. The execution of the buy-back will be influenced by market conditions and the company's share price.

feed.title: Silver Lake affiliate sales in DELL (NYSE: DELL) — March–April 2026 filings
feed.summary: A recent SEC Form 144 filing indicates that Silver Lake affiliates have been selling Dell Technologies Inc. (NYSE: DELL) Class C shares throughout March 2026. The filing also notes a conversion of 166,006 Class B shares to Class C shares on April 15, 2026. This activity provides insight into potential changes in ownership and market dynamics for DELL stock.

feed.title: [Form 4] SMITH A O CORP Insider Trading Activity
feed.summary: This article details an insider trading activity for SMITH A O CORP (AOS) director Christopher L. Mapes, reported in a Form 4 filing. Mapes received 2,262 shares of Common Stock as payment for his director retainer, valued at $66.32 per share, and also gained 145 shares through the company's Dividend Reinvestment Plan. These transactions increased his direct and indirect holdings in the company.

feed.title: 97,677 DELL Class C shares eligible for sale; Silver Lake March trades (NYSE: DELL)
feed.summary: Dell Technologies (NYSE: DELL) has filed a Rule 144 notice indicating 97,677 Class C shares are eligible for sale, stemming from the conversion of Class B Common Stock. The filing also details numerous open-market dispositions by various Silver Lake entities in March 2026, including sales by Silver Lake Partners IV, Silver Lake Partners V DE (AIV), and SL SPV-2, L.P., with specific share counts and gross proceeds for each transaction. This disclosure provides transparency regarding the impending sale of restricted securities and past sales by affiliated holders.

feed.title: What to know about the Live Nation verdict and how it could affect concertgoers
feed.summary: A federal jury found Live Nation, parent company of Ticketmaster, guilty of running a harmful monopoly and overcharging customers in 22 states, requiring the company to potentially pay back hundreds of millions of dollars. While this verdict doesn't offer immediate relief to concertgoers, it could lead to future changes in competition and ticket prices. The next steps involve determining penalties, which might include forcing Live Nation to sell some venues, and a judge's review of a proposed settlement from the Trump administration that senators deem insufficient.

feed.title: Applied Materials Unveils Two Deposition Systems for Sub-2nm GAA Chip Production
feed.summary: Applied Materials has introduced two new deposition systems, Producer Precision and Endura Trillium, designed for sub-2nm gate-all-around (GAA) chip production. These systems address the increasing complexity of advanced transistor architectures by offering precise material deposition for improved performance, reduced power consumption, and higher yields. The Producer Precision focuses on selective silicon nitride PECVD for trench isolation, while the Endura Trillium specializes in precise metal gate stack deposition for GAA transistors.

feed.title: S&P Global downgrades ASX after Australian regulator finds governance, risk failures
feed.summary: S&P Global Ratings has downgraded the Australian Securities Exchange (ASX) to "A+/A-1" from "AA-/A-1+", following an Australian regulator's findings of governance and risk management failures. The downgrade reflects ASX's history of missteps, including trading outages and an aborted CHESS replacement program, which led to regulatory criticism over weak governance and inadequate risk controls. Despite the downgrade, S&P revised its outlook for ASX to "stable" from "negative," expecting the company to retain its dominant market position in the Australian financial market.

feed.title: Anglogold Ashanti PLC (AU) Shares Fall 4.8% -- GF Value Says Still Overvalued
feed.summary: Anglogold Ashanti PLC (AU) shares fell 4.8% to $104.47, a price significantly above its GF Value™ of $49.93, indicating it is overvalued by 109.2%. Despite a strong GF Score™ of 79/100, driven by growth and financial strength, its valuation score is notably low at 1/10, and there have been no insider transactions in the last three months. Investors are cautioned due to the narrow margin of safety and potential for downward adjustments.

feed.title: Artiva Biotherapeutics Spotlights RA as Lead NK Cell Program, Eyes H1 Efficacy Data Catalyst at Needham
feed.summary: Artiva Biotherapeutics is focusing on rheumatoid arthritis (RA) as the primary indication for its off-the-shelf NK cell therapy, expecting to release efficacy data from at least 15 RA patients in the first half of the year. The company uses non-genetically modified NK cells in combination with rituximab to achieve deep B-cell depletion, targeting a 50% ACR50 response in late-line RA patients. Artiva also highlighted the therapy's safety profile, manufacturing scalability from single cord units, and its financial runway extended into Q2 2027.

feed.title: Arcutis to Report First Quarter 2026 Financial Results and Host Conference Call on May 6, 2026
feed.summary: Arcutis Biotherapeutics, Inc. announced it will report its first quarter 2026 financial results and provide a business update on May 6, 2026, after the U.S. financial markets close. The company will also host a conference call and webcast the same day at 4:30 PM ET, with a replay available on its investor website. Arcutis is a commercial-stage biopharmaceutical company focused on immuno-dermatology, with a growing portfolio for inflammatory skin diseases.

feed.title: Starbucks Launches ChatGPT Beta App To Inspire Drink Orders
feed.summary: Starbucks has launched a beta version of an app within ChatGPT, allowing customers to find and customize drink orders using generative AI by typing "@Starbucks." This initiative is part of Starbucks' "Back to Starbucks" strategy to boost customer engagement, especially among younger demographics, and follows their previous AI integration with Microsoft's Azure OpenAI platform. While customization and location selection are available through the ChatGPT app, final purchases still need to be completed via the Starbucks app or website to maintain loyalty program integrity.

feed.title: JPMorganChase Declares Preferred Stock Dividends
feed.summary: JPMorgan Chase & Co. (NYSE: JPM) has declared dividends on its Series DD, EE, GG, JJ, KK, LL, MM, and NN preferred stock, with information available on its Investor Relations website. The firm, a leading financial services provider with $4.9 trillion in assets as of March 31, 2026, operates globally in investment banking, consumer services, commercial banking, transaction processing, and asset management.

feed.title: AMD, Arm, Qualcomm back self-driving startup Wayve
feed.summary: Chipmakers AMD, Arm Holdings, and Qualcomm have collectively invested $60 million in UK-based self-driving startup Wayve, extending its Series D funding round. This investment highlights the growing confidence in AI-powered mobility and advanced driver-assistance systems (ADAS), positioning these semiconductor firms at the forefront of AI-driven vehicle systems. Wayve's reliance on embodied AI and machine learning for scalable autonomous driving solutions aligns with the strategic interests of its new investors, and this partnership marks a significant convergence of hardware and software ecosystems in the evolving mobility landscape.

feed.title: Is Ulta’s Messi Fragrances And Virtue Labs Push Altering The Investment Case For Ulta Beauty (ULTA)?
feed.summary: Ulta Beauty is expanding its partnerships with Virtue Labs and launching Messi Fragrances exclusively, utilizing its physical footprint and omni-channel reach. While these moves strengthen Ulta's role as a launch platform for beauty brands and enhance its haircare assortment, they do not fundamentally change the investment focus on preserving margins and offsetting rising store costs or the eventual loss of the Target partnership. Analysts project Ulta's revenue to reach $13.8 billion and earnings to hit $1.3 billion by 2028, with a fair value estimate suggesting a 27% upside.

feed.title: Insider Sell: Jennifer Piepszak Sells 9,136 Shares of JPMorgan C
feed.summary: Jennifer Piepszak, Chief Operating Officer of JPMorgan Chase & Co's Consumer & Community Banking, sold 9,136 shares of JPM on April 15, 2026. This transaction increased her total sales over the past year to 29,964 shares, with no purchases. JPMorgan Chase & Co stock is currently considered modestly overvalued with a price-to-GF-Value ratio of 1.2.

feed.title: ‘Load Up,’ Says Morgan Stanley as Microsoft Stock (MSFT) Gets a Boost from CIO Survey
feed.summary: Microsoft stock is regaining strength, climbing 15% from its late-March lows, driven by positive sentiment regarding its AI spending. A recent Morgan Stanley CIO survey indicates Microsoft is a leader in generative AI and cloud migration, with strong prospects for increased software spending in 2026. Analyst Keith Weiss reiterated an Overweight rating and a $650 price target for MSFT, citing the company's strong competitive positioning in cloud workflows and GenAI.

feed.title: Insider Selling: JPMorgan Chase & Co. (NYSE:JPM) COO Sells 9,136 Shares of Stock
feed.summary: JPMorgan Chase & Co. (NYSE:JPM) COO Jennifer Piepszak sold 9,136 shares of the company's stock for approximately $2.80 million, reducing her stake by 9.22% under a pre-arranged Rule 10b5-1 plan. This sale followed a strong Q1 earnings beat, though management issued a cautionary outlook by trimming full-year net interest income guidance and flagging elevated expenses. Despite the mixed news, JPMorgan increased its quarterly dividend by about 7% to $1.50 per share.

feed.title: Insider Selling: Ingersoll Rand (NYSE:IR) Insider Sells 30,492 Shares of Stock
feed.summary: Ingersoll Rand insider Vicente Reynal sold 30,492 shares of the company's stock on April 13th for approximately $2.68 million, reducing his stake by 12.7%. This sale follows several other large transactions by Reynal earlier in the year. The stock traded down 5.7% following the announcement, with analysts holding a consensus "Hold" rating and an average price target of $98.00.

feed.title: Insider Selling: Arista Networks (NYSE:ANET) CEO Sells 112,812 Shares of Stock
feed.summary: Arista Networks CEO Jayshree Ullal sold 112,812 shares of the company's stock for approximately $16.93 million, significantly reducing her direct ownership. This transaction occurred under a pre-arranged trading plan, following a quarter where Arista beat earnings and revenue estimates. Analysts maintain a "Buy" rating for Arista Networks, citing strong margins and positive industry trends, including increasing AI-driven networking demand.

feed.title: Paycom Software Inc (PAYC) Shares Surge 3.2% -- What GF Score of 81 Tells Investors
feed.summary: Paycom Software Inc (PAYC) shares increased by 3.2% to $123.64. Despite a strong GF Score™ of 81/100, indicating robust profitability and growth, the stock is considered undervalued by 49.4% based on the GF Value™ estimate, labeled as a "Possible Value Trap." Investors are advised to exercise caution and consider broader financial landscapes due to weak valuation and momentum ranks, and the absence of recent insider transactions.

feed.title: Net revenue of Banco Bilbao Vizcaya Argentaria, S.A. – GETTEX:BOY
feed.summary: The article provides financial information specifically the net revenue of Banco Bilbao Vizcaya Argentaria, S.A. (BOY) traded on Gettex. It appears to be a stub or a section of a larger financial data page on TradingView, listing the period, value, and change in net revenue.

feed.title: Alpha Cognition Reports Inducement Grants Under Nasdaq Listing Rule 5635(c)(4)
feed.summary: Alpha Cognition Inc. announced inducement grants of nonstatutory stock options to a new non-executive employee on April 14, 2026. These options allow the employee to purchase 20,000 shares of common stock at an exercise price of $6.49 per share, vesting over three years, in accordance with Nasdaq Listing Rule 5635(c)(4). The grants were made under the company's 2026 Inducement Grant Plan, designed for new employees.

feed.title: J.B. Hunt Q1 earnings jump 20%, revenue up over 4%
feed.summary: J.B. Hunt Transport Services Inc. reported a significant increase in its first-quarter earnings, with net income rising by over 20% and revenue by more than 4%. The Lowell-based company surpassed analyst expectations amidst a recovering freight market characterized by tightening capacity and rising demand. The strong performance was attributed to a strategic focus on operational excellence, including a successful $100 million cost-cutting initiative, and improved market conditions despite initial challenging winter weather.

feed.title: CGEN SEC Filings - Compugen 10-K, 10-Q, 8-K Forms
feed.summary: This page provides access to Compugen (CGEN) SEC filings, including 10-K, 10-Q, 8-K, and Form 6-K reports, which are crucial for understanding the company's financial status, clinical developments, and material agreements. Stock Titan offers these regulatory documents along with AI-powered summaries for easier analysis. Recent filings include quarterly results, clinical trial updates, and amendments to licensing agreements, providing insights into Compugen's funding, operations, and partnerships with companies like AstraZeneca and Gilead.

feed.title: Amphastar Pharmaceuticals Highlights Baqsimi Milestones, Primatene Growth at Needham Conference
feed.summary: Amphastar Pharmaceuticals provided updates on its growth drivers and pipeline at the Needham conference. The company expects Baqsimi sales to hit $175 million this year, triggering a significant milestone payment, despite some pricing pressure. Primatene Mist is projected for high single to low double-digit growth, while Amphastar also plans for new launches, including AMP-007 in early Q2 and key diabetes biosimilars in 2027.

feed.title: Astera Labs (ALAB) CEO-linked trust sells 123,750 shares under 10b5-1 plan
feed.summary: A living trust associated with Astera Labs CEO Mohan Jitendra sold 123,750 shares of Common Stock in open-market transactions on April 10, 2026. These sales, totaling approximately $18.52 million, were executed automatically under a Rule 10b5-1 trading plan adopted on December 1, 2025. After the transactions, the living trust indirectly holds 4,407,982 shares, and Mr. Jitendra also has direct and other indirect holdings through various estate planning trusts.

feed.title: Lubi Kutua Sells 419,042 Shares of Beyond Meat (NASDAQ:BYND) Stock
feed.summary: Beyond Meat's CFO, Lubi Kutua, sold 419,042 shares of the company's stock on April 13, 2026, for approximately $251,425, reducing her stake by 6.79%. This transaction occurred as the company missed quarterly earnings and revenue expectations and faces negative analyst sentiment, with a consensus "Strong Sell" rating and a target price of $0.83. The stock is currently trading around $0.75, near its 52-week low.

feed.title: Kraft Mac & Cheese launches restaurant‑inspired flavors
feed.summary: Kraft Mac & Cheese has launched three new "Restaurant Edition" flavors inspired by elevated restaurant-style mac and cheese. These new varieties, including Parmesan Pesto, Romano Cacio e Pepe, and Monterey Jack Caramelized Onion, offer 30% more food than the classic blue box and are designed for affordability and convenience without leaving home. The new lineup is rolling out to retailers nationwide this month.

feed.title: Reynal Vicente, Ingersoll Rand director, sells $2.6m in shares
feed.summary: Ingersoll Rand director Reynal Vicente sold 30,492 shares of common stock for $2.6 million and exercised options to acquire an equivalent number of shares. Following the transaction, Vicente directly owns 209,534 shares. The company recently reported strong financial results for Q4 2025, exceeding market expectations for EPS and revenue, leading to an increased price target from Stifel.

feed.title: Cadence Design Systems (CDNS) Stock Jumps on Nvidia Robotics AI Partnership
feed.summary: Cadence Design Systems (CDNS) and Nvidia (NVDA) announced a partnership to develop AI for robotics, causing Cadence's stock to rise 2.46%. The collaboration will integrate Cadence's physics simulation technology with Nvidia's AI models to train robots more efficiently in virtual environments. This aims to speed up the process of getting robots from training to performing actual tasks by making simulations more realistic.

feed.title: Woodward to sell pilot controls unit to Ontic Engineering
feed.summary: Woodward, Inc. announced an agreement to sell its pilot controls product line and associated services to Ontic Engineering and Manufacturing. This strategic move aims to optimize Woodward's portfolio and focus on core growth areas, while Ontic will provide product support expertise. The deal, subject to customary conditions, includes a long-term supply arrangement where Woodward will remain the sole supplier of certain electromechanical components for pilot controls.

feed.title: Woodward exits pilot controls, keeps parts supply in Ontic deal
feed.summary: Woodward (NASDAQ: WWD) has announced an agreement to sell its pilot controls product line to Ontic Engineering and Manufacturing, including throttle quadrant assemblies, rudder pedals, and passive side sticks. This move aligns with Woodward's strategy to optimize its portfolio and focus on core growth areas in aerospace. As part of the deal, Woodward will continue to be the sole supplier of certain electromechanical components and will provide transition services for 9-12 months.

feed.title: IQVIA to Announce First-Quarter 2026 Results on May 5, 2026
feed.summary: IQVIA Holdings Inc. will announce its first-quarter 2026 financial results before market open on Tuesday, May 5, 2026. The management team will also host a conference call and webcast at 9:00 a.m. Eastern Time on the same day. Details for accessing the earnings release, webcast, and conference call registration are available on the IQVIA Investor Relations website.

feed.title: Regions Financial Declares Quarterly Dividends
feed.summary: Regions Financial Corporation has announced the declaration of quarterly cash dividends on its common and preferred stock, to be paid in Q2 2026. The bank will issue a cash dividend of $0.265 per share of common stock and dividends on its Series C, E, and F preferred stock. This declaration highlights the company's financial stability and ongoing commitment to providing returns to its shareholders.

feed.title: Escondido Apple Store closing in June
feed.summary: The Apple Store located inside the North County Mall in Escondido is slated for closure in June. Apple cited the mall's "declining conditions" and the departure of other retailers as reasons for the closure. Employees from the Escondido store will be relocated to other nearby Apple Store locations, as Apple is also closing two other stores nationwide.
